---
title: "SectorMetrics.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/components/SectorMetrics.tsx"
loc: 20
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.43
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 2.00
overall_score: 4.99
---

## Intent
React component rendering SectorMetrics.

## Interaction Protocol
Include <SectorMetrics /> within a React-Three-Fiber Canvas context.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://react)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `SectorMetrics`
- `SectorMetrics`
- `overallScore`
